t-allow-backorder: Allow orders when out of stock
t-canonical-url-tip: Canonical URL to avoid duplicate content.
t-mass-tooltip: Used to calculate volume when shipping
t-price-tooltip: Amount the customer needs to pay
t-comparative-price-tooltip: The amount before discount, shows the discount value, incentives for customers
t-sku-tooltip: SKU, product code for each product should be unique, including both letters and numbers
t-barcode-tooltip: Barcode - Barcodes are usually created by the Manufacturer
t-quantity-tooltip: Conversion quantity compared to base unit
t-sell-unit-tooltip: Select if you want to sell using this unit
t-notice-change-password: - You will be required to sign in again after changing your password.
t-unit-variants: This product has many variations. For example, different sizes, colors
alt-note: If the image cannot be displayed for any reason, the ALT text will be shown. The ALT should be short but descriptive.
t-amount-paid-other-costs: Amount paid for other receiving costs
t-search-product-loadmore: Search for products by name, SKU, or barcode...
t-download-template: Download Template and Import to System
t-upload-instruction: Upload a .csv or Excel file containing your products.
t-import-duplicate-sku: Import products with duplicate SKUs in the system
t-import-sku-note: For each SKU in the Excel/CSV file, the system will automatically find and add all products with the same SKU to the transfer slip.
t-disable-qty-after-scan: Click to disable quantity input after scanning
t-enable-qty-after-scan: Click to enable quantity input after scanning
t-confirm-default-address: Are you sure you want to make this your default address?
t-confirm-img-text: Are you sure you want to set this image as the main image for your product ?
t-search-product-inventories: Search for products by name, SKU, or barcode
t-out-of-stock-transfer: This product is currently out of stock in the source warehouse and cannot be transferred.
t-variant-out-of-stock-transfer: This variant is currently out of stock in the source warehouse and cannot be transferred.
t-explain-category-code: Short code used for product SKU, max 2 characters
t-explain-variant-value-code: Short code used for product SKU, max 2 characters
t-count-order-placed: The total number of orders the customer has placed, NOT including deleted orders
t-accumulated-revenue: Accumulated revenue = Paid amount (-) Refunded amount
t-variant-out-of-stock-order: This product is currently out of stock, please choose another one.
t-noti-update-position: Are you sure you want to change the position of
t-noti-update-ordering: Are you sure you want to change the ordering of
t-noti-update-quantity: Are you sure you want to change the quantity of
t-cancel-order-recommend: In case the order is fake, the customer changes their mind, or the product is out of stock, Haravan recommends that you cancel the order.
t-cancel-order-warning: Canceling an order is an action that cannot be undone.
t-adjust-or-create-transfer: Please adjust the quantities or create a new transfer order.
t-info-stock-export-failed: Insufficient stock for the following products:
t-msg-try-adjust-search: Try changing your filters or search conditions.
t-des-confirm-stocktaking: After confirming, you will no longer be able to modify the stocktaking results on this record.
t-sure-confirm-stocktaking: Are you sure you want to complete the stocktaking?
t-des-confirm-reconcil: Stock reconciliation will update the system inventory levels of products with discrepancies based on the actual counted quantities.
t-sure-confirm-reconcil: Are you sure you want to proceed with the reconciliation?
t-skus-excluded: List of SKUs excluded due to incorrect input data
t-duplicate-skus: Duplicate SKUs in the import file
t-confirm-order-prompt: Are you sure you want to verify this order?
t-note-for-employees: You and other employees will see this note.
t-confirm-bulk-delivery-prompt: Are you sure you want to deliver these orders in bulk?
t-warning-reload: - Orders are being processed by the carrier. Please reload the page after a few seconds.
t-recreate-order-confirmation: Create a new order from order
t-confirm-recreate-order-prompt: This action will create a new order based on the original order and cancel the original order. Are you sure?
t-automatic-customer-group-desc: You can run care or marketing campaigns for customers who share common characteristics.
t-static-customer-group-desc: For customers who do not share common characteristics and must be manually assigned to this group.
t-approved-comment-prompt: Are you sure you want to approved this comment?
t-hidden-comment-prompt: Are you sure you want to hidden this comment?
t-delete-comment-prompt: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
t-revert: You won't be able to revert this!
t-revert-sync-product-push: This will synchronize selected products with Pancake
t-revert-sync-product-push-haravan: This will synchronize selected products with Haravan
t-revert-sync-product-pull: This action will pull products from Pancake into the system for synchronization
t-noti-create-cate-pan: Some categories in this list need to be created manually on Pancake. Please create them and click the reload button below to resync
t-explain-reload-btn: Click to reload categories manually created in Pancake
t-noti-reload: Please reload the page. If the updates are not visible yet, kindly wait a moment and try again
t-title-sync-product: Products are being updated to Pancake
t-revert-sync-pan-to-ecom: This action will sync products Pancake to Ecom
t-sync-pull-overwrite-warning: This action will overwrite the current inventory on Pancake and cannot be undone
t-sync-pull-overwrite-warning-haravan: This action will overwrite the current inventory on Haravan and cannot be undone
t-confirm-override-inventory: I understand and agree to overwrite the current inventory
t-product-invalid-or-unavailable: invalid, deleted, or no longer available.
t-auto-add-to-category: Products will be automatically added to this category based on the conditions below.
t-choose-add-method: You can choose one of the two methods below to add products to this category.
t-category-include-variant-match: - This category will include all products that have at least one variant matching the conditions:
t-try-adjust-conditions: Try adjusting your filter conditions to find matching products
t-noti-confirm-restock: Do you confirm the goods have been checked and restocked?
t-revert-sync-product-pull-haravan: This action will pull products from Haravan into the system for synchronization
t-select-sync-date-range: Select product creation time to sync
t-sync-products-created-date-note-1: Choose the period based on the product creation date on Haravan.
t-sync-products-created-date-note-2: Leave it blank to sync all products.
t-sync-date-filter-note: If only one date is selected, synchronization will filter accordingly.
t-sync-orders-created-date-note: Choose the period based on Pancake order dates
t-sync-orders-created-date-note-har: Choose the period based on Haravan order dates
t-revert-sync-haravan-to-ecom: This action will sync products Haravan to Ecom
t-sync-inventory-note: Update inventory quantities from Haravan to the system
t-inventory-overwrite-warning-note: The system will replace all current inventory quantities with data from Haravan.
t-confirm-inventory-overwrite: I understand and accept the inventory overwrite
t-select-sync-date-range-order: Select order creation time to sync
t-background-processing: Background process is running in the system
t-haravan-data-missing: Some data from Haravan does not exist in the system.
t-pancake-data-missing: Some data from Pancake does not exist in the system.
t-revert-sync-order-push-pancake: This will synchronize orders from Ecom to Pancake
t-revert-sync-order-push-haravan: This will synchronize orders from Ecom to Haravan
t-title-sync-order: Orders are being updated to Pancake
t-sync-orders-push-created-date-note: Choose the period based on the order dates on the Ecom
t-explain-reload-btn-pancake: Click to reload the sync status
t-certainty-sync-pull-pancake: Đồng bộ những đơn hàng sang Pancake ?
t-revert-sync-product-pull-pancake: This will synchronize orders from Ecom to Pancake
t-history-payment-event-warning: Payment event received from Pancake. The e-commerce payment records have not been updated yet
t-sync-ecom-images-to-haravan: Synchronize images from Ecom to Haravan
t-customer-wrong_product: Wrong product / Wrong COD / Late delivery / Fake order / Changed mind / Damaged product (Customer)
t-customer-wrong_address: Wrong address / Address changed / Wrong phone number (Customer)
t-carrier-bad_weather: Road closure / Natural disaster / Bad weather (Carrier)
